name: AI Adoption Architecture Pack
description: The core Bridge Work facilitation set for explaining why AI adoption is an architecture problem, not a tool purchase.
facilitation_arc: Open with the Flywheel to frame momentum.
Drop into the People/Work/Data/Governance map when the client says 'we just need Copilot'.
Use the Risk/Value matrix to prioritise once the field is mapped.
Close on the M365 readiness map to make the next step concrete.
